title: Share your feedback

placeholders.like: e.g. The map made it easy to find nearby groups...
placeholders.dislike: e.g. I wanted to filter by region...
placeholders.reality: e.g. The map didn't update after I clicked...

validation.like: Please tell us what you liked
validation.dislike: Please fill in the mandatory fields

privacyNote: We automatically capture your browser version and system info to help us troubleshoot.

publishAsIdea.label: Also publish this as a public idea on the roadmap
publishAsIdea.hint: Others can upvote and comment on it. Your feedback details stay private.
publishAsIdea.titleRequired: Please add a short title for your idea.
publishAsIdea.failed: Could not publish to the community board.
